title: Heaps, Priority Queues, and Scheduling · Spiral Review
summary: Schedule incidents by urgency, arrival, and changing operational priority. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a stable priority scheduler with heap invariants after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Relate complete-tree shape to array indices and parent-child heap order.
Trace sift-up, sift-down, push, pop, replace, and heapify costs.
Add stable tie breakers without comparing unrelated payload objects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
